global.ready_message: Connected. Lumax Web UI is ready.
global.jen_voice_note: Use this voice id + engine for every shell (Web, Mobile, Desktop) when calling lumax_body POST /tts. VR: prefer soul-returned audio or the same mouth URL so Jen sounds like one person.

web.auth_blurb: Sign in once to unlock this console; your browser keeps the session until it expires or site data is cleared. Optional cloud features may ask you to sign in separately.
web.consent_body: Session and environment data may be used to improve your companion’s behavior. Treat sensitive inputs accordingly. You can stop using the UI at any time.
web.utils_blurb: Operational notices and reminders. Content is served from announcements.json next to the Web UI (editable on disk).

mobile.bridge_note: React app under Frontend/Body/Mobile/Version1 — same lumax_ops :8080 session + /api/* as Web UI; see that folder README for Vite proxy and Capacitor.
